channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Iran Warns Of "Decisive" Action After US Strikes Around Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Iranian state media on Tuesday reported a series of explosions heard in the Strait of Hormuz region.

item.description: Iranian state media on Tuesday reported a series of explosions heard in the Strait of Hormuz region, moments after US officials announced "powerful" strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: Iranian state media on Tuesday reported a series of explosions heard in the Strait of Hormuz region, moments after US officials announced "powerful" strikes on Iran.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Launches Fresh Strikes Against Iran, Revokes Waiver After Hormuz Attacks

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: At NATO Summit, Trump Reiterates US Should Control Greenland

media:content.media:description: Trump said the issue of control over Greenland had harmed US ties with NATO.

item.description: Donald Trump said Greenland should be controlled by the United States, not Denmark, reaffirming a stance that has caused tensions among NATO allies just as leaders of the alliance gathered for a summit in Turkey.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump said Greenland should be controlled by the United States, not Denmark, reaffirming a stance that has caused tensions among NATO allies just as leaders of the alliance gathered for a summit in Turkey.

item.title: US Launches "Series Of Powerful Strikes" On Iran After Hormuz Attacks

media:content.media:description: The renewed fighting is likely to complicate ongoing talks.

item.description: The strikes came just hours after the three tankers were hit by projectiles while sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The strikes came just hours after the three tankers were hit by projectiles while sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Pakistan Cargo Plane Carrying 5 Goes Missing Over Arabian Sea

media:content.media:description: The authority said in a post on X that search-and-rescue operations were under way in the Arabian Sea.

item.description: A Pakistani cargo plane with five crew members aboard went missing late Tuesday after rapidly descending and losing contact with air traffic controllers off the coast of the southern port city of Karachi, Pakistan's Civil Aviation Authority said.
item.content:encoded: A Pakistani cargo plane with five crew members aboard went missing late Tuesday after rapidly descending and losing contact with air traffic controllers off the coast of the southern port city of Karachi, Pakistan's Civil Aviation Authority said.

item.title: US Revokes Iran Oil Waiver After Tanker Attacks In Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The US canceled a license announced in June that had allowed Iran to produce, sell and deliver crude oil.

item.description: The US Treasury Department canceled a license announced in June that had allowed Iran to produce, sell and deliver crude oil and related products through August 21.
item.content:encoded: The US Treasury Department canceled a license announced in June that had allowed Iran to produce, sell and deliver crude oil and related products through August 21.

item.title: French Far-Right Leader Le Pen Says She Will Run For President Next Year

media:content.media:description: Le Pen in 2011 took over leadership of the FN from her father.

item.description: Born in 1968, Le Pen was just four years old when her father Jean-Marie co-founded the National Front (FN), France's main postwar far-right movement.
item.content:encoded: Born in 1968, Le Pen was just four years old when her father Jean-Marie co-founded the National Front (FN), France's main postwar far-right movement.

item.title: Trump Praises "Chemistry" With Turkish President, Bashes NATO At Summit

media:content.media:description: The summit comes at a fraught time for the 77-year-old transatlantic alliance.

item.description: Trump was greeted personally by Erdogan on the tarmac as he descended from Air Force One, before being escorted through the empty streets of the Turkish capital by a guard of riders on white horses.
item.content:encoded: Trump was greeted personally by Erdogan on the tarmac as he descended from Air Force One, before being escorted through the empty streets of the Turkish capital by a guard of riders on white horses.

item.title: Body Of Iran's Ayatollah Khamenei Arrives In Iraq Before Procession
On Camera, Israeli Officer Tosses Stun Grenade Into Car Carrying Palestinians

media:content.media:description: In the footage, the officer walks up to the car and shouts at the people inside

item.description: The CCTV clip, recorded on Sunday and released by Israeli human rights group B'Tselem, shows an officer confronting a vehicle before the situation quickly escalates.
item.content:encoded: The CCTV clip, recorded on Sunday and released by Israeli human rights group B'Tselem, shows an officer confronting a vehicle before the situation quickly escalates.

item.title: Under-Construction Manhattan Skyscraper's Columns Buckle, Hundreds Evacuated

media:content.media:description: A nearby school with about 400 children was among the evacuated buildings.

item.description: The 1970s-era office building was being converted to luxury apartments, and is the former global headquarters of pharmaceutical giant Pfizer.
item.content:encoded: The 1970s-era office building was being converted to luxury apartments, and is the former global headquarters of pharmaceutical giant Pfizer.

item.title: In PM Modi's Speech At Indonesian Parliament, A Nehru Mention

media:content.media:description: PM Narendra Modi became the first Indian prime minister to address the Indonesian parliament

item.description: "Both our countries have made diversity the very foundation of our unity within our democracies," Prime Minister Narendra Modi said in the Indonesian parliament
item.content:encoded: "Both our countries have made diversity the very foundation of our unity within our democracies," Prime Minister Narendra Modi said in the Indonesian parliament

item.title: 3 Tankers, Including India-Bound Vessel, Attacked In Hormuz In 24 Hours

media:content.media:description: The second tanker sustained structural damage when it was hit, but no one was injured (File photo)

item.description: One of the tankers caught fire after being attacked while travelling off the coast of Oman. Although theIranian state television said the liquefied natural gas tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings, it did not directly claim the assault.
item.content:encoded: One of the tankers caught fire after being attacked while travelling off the coast of Oman. Although theIranian state television said the liquefied natural gas tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings, it did not directly claim the assault.

item.title: India Calls for Human-Centric, Inclusive AI Governance at UN Global Dialogue

media:content.media:description: Singh said AI governance must be rooted in meaningful human oversight

item.description: Minister of State for External Affairs Kirti Vardhan Singh said AI governance must be rooted in meaningful human oversight, respect for human rights and international cooperation.
item.content:encoded: Minister of State for External Affairs Kirti Vardhan Singh said AI governance must be rooted in meaningful human oversight, respect for human rights and international cooperation.

item.title: Prince Harry Loses Battle Against British Tabloids As Judge Rejects Lawsuit
item.description: Attorney David Sherborne said the Daily Mail and its sister publication, Mail on Sunday, used its journalists, freelance reporters and private eyes for "clear, systematic and sustained use of unlawful information gathering" to snoop on his clients.
item.content:encoded: Attorney David Sherborne said the Daily Mail and its sister publication, Mail on Sunday, used its journalists, freelance reporters and private eyes for "clear, systematic and sustained use of unlawful information gathering" to snoop on his clients.

item.title: "Reckless Display Of Power": China's Pacific Missile Test Puts Nations On Alert

media:content.media:description: The missile launch came at a time when strategic competition in the Pacific is intensifying

item.description: The long-range ballistic missile, carrying a dummy warhead, was fired from a nuclear-powered submarine on Monday during what Beijing described as routine annual military training.
item.content:encoded: The long-range ballistic missile, carrying a dummy warhead, was fired from a nuclear-powered submarine on Monday during what Beijing described as routine annual military training.

item.title: Return Of War Possible, Prepared For It: Key Iran Official

media:content.media:description: Iran is committed to implementing the MOU with the US, he said.

item.description: Esmail Baghaei pointed out that since Iran has been attacked twice by the US amid talks, there is no guarantee that another attack won't take place.
item.content:encoded: Esmail Baghaei pointed out that since Iran has been attacked twice by the US amid talks, there is no guarantee that another attack won't take place.

item.title: Khamenei Will Be Regarded As Second Imam Hussain In 100 Years: Iran

media:content.media:description: Hundreds of thousands of people have gathered in Iran as the last rites of Ali Khamenei.

item.description: Iranian foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei said that people have been likening the leader's assassination to the martyrdom of Imam Hussain.
item.content:encoded: Iranian foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei said that people have been likening the leader's assassination to the martyrdom of Imam Hussain.

item.title: India, Indonesia Chart Roadmap To Deepen Defence, Maritime And Economic Ties

media:content.media:description: Both sides committed themselves to addressing tariff and non-tariff barriers

item.description: The joint statement issued after bilateral talks in Jakarta outlined an ambitious agenda spanning defence industrial collaboration, counter-terrorism, supply chain resilience, energy security, cultural exchanges and multilateral coordination.
item.content:encoded: The joint statement issued after bilateral talks in Jakarta outlined an ambitious agenda spanning defence industrial collaboration, counter-terrorism, supply chain resilience, energy security, cultural exchanges and multilateral coordination.

item.title: Trump's "I Like Her" Remark On Meloni Amid Spat, Then A 'No Help' Complaint

media:content.media:description: Trump said Meloni made a "mistake" by not getting involved in operations in the Strait of Hormuz

item.description: During a meeting with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, when a reporter asked Trump to clarify his social media post regarding the 'restraining order' post on Meloni, the US President said, "We had a bad relationship. It became a little bad because she refused to help us."
item.content:encoded: During a meeting with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, when a reporter asked Trump to clarify his social media post regarding the 'restraining order' post on Meloni, the US President said, "We had a bad relationship. It became a little bad because she refused to help us."
